title: pasania costata
intro: Pasania costata, also known as Pashanbhed, is a plant species that belongs to the mahogany family and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pasania costata include relief from gastrointestinal disorders, bronchitis, and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Herbal preparations of Pasania costata include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications to treat various health conditions.
